headline: FIS to Present at Upcoming Conference
summary: JACKSONVILLE, Fla., May 12, 2026--FIS® (NYSE: FIS), a global leader in financial technology, will present on Tuesday, May 19, 2026 at the J.P. Morgan 54th Annual Global Technology, Media and Communications Conference at 4:15 pm ET.

headline: FIS® Supply Chain Finance Platform Powers Landmark $2.55 Billion Glencore Oil and Gas Trade Receivables Securitization
summary: JACKSONVILLE, Fla., May 12, 2026--Global financial technology leader FIS® (NYSE: FIS) announced today that its Supply Chain Finance Platform (formerly Demica) was selected by Glencore PLC to support the inaugural trade receivables securitization program for its oil and gas commodity business.

headline: FIS discounts Pismo competition
summary: The payments processor and core tech provider doesn’t expect competition from that Visa business to make an impact.
